subject: Upgrade Portal to use common Cassandra charts
commit_message:
Upgrade Portal to use common Cassandra charts

Change-Id: I634d007e94b6ab46a6f0b559782d2f5c8ffb9f28
Issue-ID: OOM-1190
Signed-off-by: prpatel <pradeep.patel2@amdocs.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.
Topic set to Integration of portal wd Cassandra common
Topic changed from Integration of portal wd Cassandra common to Integration of portal with common cassandra
